overview: East Texas Testosterone & Hormone Therapy provides personalized bio-identical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) to address hormonal imbalances in men and women. Services include thyroid optimization, weight management, and targeted vitamin therapies.
highlights: Biote BHRT pellets for consistent hormone release
Multiple testosterone delivery options (pellets, patches, creams, pills, injections)
Thyroid optimization and weight management programs
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormonal imbalances who seek personalized hormone optimization and wellness support.
